LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTINE GARCIA'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. OPPOSITION ACCEPTED BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT PREJUDICED BY THE LATE FILING. Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Philomena Dias, CSR: Lisa Schwam.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff: The Education Resources Institute, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Christine Garcia as follows:
Damages/Principal $44,713.24
Prejudgment Interest $3,329.24
Attorney's Fees $2,952.79
Costs $426.95, for a total of $51,422.22.
Judgment signed in open court.
